name: bookkeepers managing 10-30 clients tool
description: For bookkeepers managing 10-30 clients, inefficient categorization of bank transactions causes time-consuming manual bookkeeping. We automate categorization instead of manual categorization of transactions in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient categorization of bank transactions leads to time-consuming manual bookkeeping.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient categorization of bank transactions leads to time-consuming manual bookkeeping.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For bookkeepers managing 10-30 clients, inefficient categorization of bank transactions causes time-consuming manual bookkeeping. We automate categorization instead of manual categorization of transactions in spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual categorization of transactions in spreadsheets

one_liner: For bookkeepers managing 10-30 clients, inefficient categorization of bank transactions causes time-consuming manual bookkeeping. We automate categorization instead of manual categorization of transactions in spreadsheets.
